semantic.role: Batch commit handler for file indexing records in the SQLite infrastructure layer.
responsibilities: Atomically insert or update a batch of file index records (path, hash, kind, lastIndexedAt, docs, is_authoritative, mtime, size) into the `files` table.
Detect and record semantic drift events by calling `recordDriftEvent` when a file's recorded role or responsibilities change between commits.
Manage batch transaction lifecycle via better-sqlite3 transactions.
outOfScope: Does not perform individual file indexing or AST extraction — it only commits pre-computed batch records.
Does not handle read queries or retrieval of file data.
Does not implement the drift detection logic itself — delegates to `recordDriftEvent`.
invariants: All commits must be executed within a database transaction, ensuring atomicity of the batch.
File records are upserted based on path (ON CONFLICT UPDATE).
Drift events must be recorded for any file whose metadata indicates a change in role or responsibilities.
Imports from a deeper repository submodule (`repositories/drift.js`) — if a public facade for drift recording exists, this import should be replaced to comply with `infra-facade-imports`.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provides a low-level batch write abstraction for the file index, ensuring consistency and drift tracking within the SQLite persistence layer.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of the ArchSpine v1.0.0 release establishing the core infrastructure for file indexing and semantic drift detection.

publicSurface.description: Atomically inserts or updates a batch of file index records and records any detected semantic drift events.
